my_thoughts: They asked 'why don't you go down?'—they think I should calculate risk. But deliberation about externals (death, pain) is incompatible with character. I don't deliberate—I act from character. This will confuse them ('Why?') because they think calculation is necessary. The explanation will show: once you deliberate about externals, you've forgotten your character.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student asked 'why don't you go down?' They think I should calculate risk. But deliberation about externals is incompatible with character. I don't deliberate—I act from character. This will confuse them ('Why?') because they think calculation is necessary.
visible_response: Because I do not even deliberate about the matter.
